prep_notes.Monday: Start brining chicken in morning, defrost any frozen vegetables needed
prep_notes.Wednesday: Take roast beef out to come to room temperature, prep vegetable soup early
prep_notes.Thursday: Defrost shredded chicken if frozen, start beef stew early
prep_notes.Friday: Defrost flounder fillets, prepare breading station
prep_notes.Saturday: Start lentil soup early in day, prep vegetables for roasting
prep_notes.Sunday: Survey all leftovers morning, consolidate containers

Monday.dinner: Brined roast chicken with mashed potatoes and steamed broccoli
Monday.boys_help: JP: brine the chicken in salt water · Joseph: wash and peel potatoes for mashing · Michael: rinse broccoli florets
Monday.helpers: JP leads brining prep & cooking — Joseph assists with potatoes — Michael washes vegetables

Tuesday.dad_lunch: Split pea soup in thermos with crackers
Tuesday.boys_help: JP: reheat chicken and sides in oven · Joseph: measure rice for cooking · Michael: set chicken pieces on serving plate
Tuesday.helpers: Joseph reheats chicken & sides — Michael stirs sides during reheating

Wednesday.dad_lunch: Leftover chicken with rice and fruit cup
Wednesday.boys_help: JP: sear roast beef in Dutch oven · Joseph: wash and chop carrots for roasting · Michael: rinse wild rice in strainer
Wednesday.helpers: Joseph reheats leftovers & assembles plates — Michael assembles plates with Joseph

Thursday.dinner: Sheet Pan Chicken Thighs with roasted carrots and potatoes
Thursday.dad_lunch: Beef stew in thermos with rolls
Thursday.boys_help: JP: warm shredded chicken with taco seasoning · Joseph: drain and rinse canned pork and beans · Michael: tear lettuce for taco toppings
Thursday.helpers: JP leads sheet pan chicken thighs assembly & roasting — Joseph preps vegetables — Michael pours seasonings

Friday.dad_lunch: Sardine sandwich or split pea soup in thermos
Friday.boys_help: JP: bread and fry flounder fillets · Joseph: prepare corn for cooking · Michael: arrange french fries on baking sheet
Friday.helpers: Joseph reheats soup — Michael pours soup into bowls

Saturday.dinner: Leftover pizza, mac & cheese, and steamed vegetable leftovers
Saturday.boys_help: JP: cook lentil soup on stovetop · Joseph: wash and chop mixed vegetables for roasting · Michael: rinse lentils in strainer
Saturday.helpers: Joseph reheats leftovers — Michael sets the table

Sunday.lunch: Slow cooker pot roast with carrots, potatoes, and onion
Sunday.boys_help: JP: reheat and organize leftover containers · Joseph: mix quinoa with vegetables for salad · Michael: arrange leftover items on serving plates
Sunday.helpers: JP leads Ziplock Buffet assembly — Joseph organizes containers — Michael pours drinks
